metadata.title: Leuprorelin 11.25 mg Therapy – 12 weeks
metadata.indication: Prostatic carcinoma where testosterone suppression is indicated.
metadata.partial_assessment_note: Any independently actionable entered value is assessed; omitted domains remain explicitly unassessed and never block a partial result.

clinical_governance.prescriptive_authority: Treatment plan must be initiated by the appropriately qualified Consultant specified in the NCCP source.
clinical_governance.dose_modification_note: Any dose modification or non-standard continuation should be discussed with a Consultant.
clinical_governance.disclaimer: Decision-support encoding of the current NCCP source. It does not replace the official NCCP regimen, clinical judgement, local policy, prescribing review or pharmacy verification.

qt_risk.label: History/risk factors for QT prolongation or concomitant QT-prolonging medicine

uncontrolled_glucose_or_diabetes.label: Poorly controlled diabetes / significant hyperglycaemia requiring review

bone_health_not_addressed.label: Long-term ADT bone-health assessment/supplementation not addressed

spinal_cord_compression_or_spinal_mets.label: Spinal cord compression or spinal metastases where this would be sole treatment

output_templates.proceed: No encoded restriction was triggered in the entered domain(s). This is not an overall treatment clearance.
output_templates.coverage_gap: Only entered values were assessed; all omitted clinically relevant domains remain unassessed.
output_templates.consultant_review: The entered value requires protocol-specific clinical review.
output_templates.withhold: Withhold and reassess according to the official NCCP pathway.
output_templates.delay: Delay treatment and reassess according to the official NCCP pathway.

action.message: Hypersensitivity to leuprorelin or excipients is a contraindication.

rules.explanation: Hypersensitivity to leuprorelin or excipients is a contraindication.

action.message: Assess the benefit-risk including torsades risk before starting androgen deprivation therapy.

rules.explanation: Assess the benefit-risk including torsades risk before starting androgen deprivation therapy.

action.message: Optimise and monitor glucose/diabetes during ADT.

rules.explanation: Optimise and monitor glucose/diabetes during ADT.

action.message: Complete bone-health assessment and apply calcium/vitamin D or other bone protection according to local policy.

rules.explanation: Complete bone-health assessment and apply calcium/vitamin D or other bone protection according to local policy.

action.message: Do not rely on this agonist as sole treatment where cord compression/spinal metastases create tumour-flare risk; urgent consultant plan required.

rules.explanation: Do not rely on this agonist as sole treatment where cord compression/spinal metastases create tumour-flare risk; urgent consultant plan required.

treatment.duration: Until disease progression or unacceptable toxicity.

regular: blood glucose and bone profile as clinically indicated

supportive_care.other: Calcium and vitamin D supplementation according to local policy.
